Digital signal processing functions for ARM Cortex-M processors and build configuration script for STM32F412xG.

## Folders
- **[STM32F4xx_DSP_StdPeriph_Lib_V1.7.0RC1](STM32F4xx_DSP_StdPeriph_Lib_V1.7.0RC1/README.md)**: Digital signal processing functions for ARM Cortex-M processors, including math operations and filtering.

## Files
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build configuration script for STM32F412xG microcontroller using STM32F4xx DSP and standard peripheral library.
